message:
refactor(wa-core): improve notification modules and vendored mux client

desktop_notify.rs (+20 lines changed):
  Refine desktop notification formatting and delivery logic for
  session_end and auth_required events, ensuring notifications include
  actionable context (session duration, auth challenge type).

webhook.rs (121 lines changed):
  Restructure webhook payload construction for the new event types.
  Improve error handling for failed webhook deliveries with structured
  retry context in log output.

vendored/mux_client.rs (+40 lines changed):
  Harden the vendored WezTerm mux client with improved error recovery
  on connection drops and more defensive parsing of mux protocol frames.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
